title: Kappatagudda Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Kappatagudda Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Karnataka

overview.short: Kappatagudda Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary located in Gadag district in the Indian state of Karnataka.
overview.description: Kappatagudda Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary located in Gadag district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It was formed in 2019 and it spans 244.15 km2 (94.27 sq mi) over dry deciduous hills across Gadag, Mundargi, and Shirahatti taluks.

topPlaces.name: Tippapura
topPlaces.description: Tippapura also spelled as Thippapura, is a village in the Mundargi taluk of Gadag district in the Indian state of Karnataka. Tippapura is located south to district headquarters Gadag and Taluka headquarters Mundargi.

items.note: Tippapura also spelled as Thippapura, is a village in the Mundargi taluk of Gadag district in the Indian state of Karnataka. Tippapura is located south to district headquarters Gadag and Taluka headquarters Mundargi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kappatagudda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kappatagudda Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kappatagudda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (76 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kappatagudda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kappatagudda Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kappatagudda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kappatagudda Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.
